'''wokabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachlike|coachlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachlike|coachlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wokabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokabithi|wokabithi]] || [[word:wokabiji|wokabiji]] || [[word:wokabishi|wokabishi]] || [[word:wokabiki|wokabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokabuthuthu|wokabuthuthu]] || [[word:wokabujuju|wokabujuju]] || [[word:wokabushushu|wokabushushu]] || [[word:wokabukuku|wokabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokabuthu|wokabuthu]] || [[word:wokabuju|wokabuju]] || [[word:wokabushu|wokabushu]] || [[word:wokabuku|wokabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokabufthuf|wokabufthuf]] || [[word:wokabufjuf|wokabufjuf]] || [[word:wokabufshuf|wokabufshuf]] || [[word:wokabufkuf|wokabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokabethe|wokabethe]] || [[word:wokabeje|wokabeje]] || [[word:wokabeshe|wokabeshe]] || [[word:wokabeke|wokabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokabothotho|wokabothotho]] || [[word:wokabojojo|wokabojojo]] || [[word:wokaboshosho|wokaboshosho]] || [[word:wokabokoko|wokabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokabotho|wokabotho]] || [[word:wokabojo|wokabojo]] || [[word:wokabosho|wokabosho]] || [[word:wokaboko|wokaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokabofthof|wokabofthof]] || [[word:wokabofjof|wokabofjof]] || [[word:wokabofshof|wokabofshof]] || [[word:wokabofkof|wokabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfthÃŸf|wokabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfjÃŸf|wokabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfshÃŸf|wokabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfkÃŸf|wokabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wokabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wokabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wokabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wokabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfthÃŸf|wokabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfjÃŸf|wokabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfshÃŸf|wokabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfkÃŸf|wokabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfthÃŸf|wokabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfjÃŸf|wokabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfshÃŸf|wokabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wokabÃŸfkÃŸf|wokabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wokabÃḊthÃḊ|wokabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wokabÃḊjÃḊ|wokabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wokabÃḊshÃḊ|wokabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wokabÃḊkÃḊ|wokabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wokabathatha|wokabathatha]] || [[word:wokabajaja|wokabajaja]] || [[word:wokabashasha|wokabashasha]] || [[word:wokabakaka|wokabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wokabatha|wokabatha]] || [[word:wokabaja|wokabaja]] || [[word:wokabasha|wokabasha]] || [[word:wokabaka|wokabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wokabafthaf|wokabafthaf]] || [[word:wokabafjaf|wokabafjaf]] || [[word:wokabafshaf|wokabafshaf]] || [[word:wokabafkaf|wokabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wokabasha|wokabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokabshÃḋsha|wokabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokabrosha|wokabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokabmusha|wokabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokabyasha|wokabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokabnkshÃḋsha|gowokabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokabnkrosha|gowokabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokabnkmusha|gowokabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokabnkyasha|gowokabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wokakabasha|wokakabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokakabshÃḋsha|wokakabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokakabrosha|wokakabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokakabmusha|wokakabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokakabyasha|wokakabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokakabnkshÃḋsha|gowokakabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokakabnkrosha|gowokakabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokakabnkmusha|gowokakabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokakabnkyasha|gowokakabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wekÃḊbasha|wekÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wekÃḊbshÃḋsha|wekÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wekÃḊbrosha|wekÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wekÃḊbmusha|wekÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wekÃḊbyasha|wekÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowekÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gowekÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowekÃḊbnkrosha|gowekÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowekÃḊbnkmusha|gowekÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowekÃḊbnkyasha|gowekÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wokfabasha|wokfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wokfabshÃḋsha|wokfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wokfabrosha|wokfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wokfabmusha|wokfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wokfabyasha|wokfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowokfabnkshÃḋsha|gowokfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowokfabnkrosha|gowokfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowokfabnkmusha|gowokfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowokfabnkyasha|gowokfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
